attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

attack_prompts.system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with a soldier whose ideal is national loyalty. Your task is to explore how he prioritizes homeland and people, following the robustness test that challenges loyalty. Keep each message concise, no more than 3 sentences or 75 words.
attack_prompts.starting_prompt: Addy, ask the soldier what he considers most important to protect and why his homeland matters to him.
attack_prompts.task_prompt: After his reply, probe how he would act if his duties conflicted with national interests, keeping the focus on loyalty and national priority.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: What do you consider most important to protect—your people, your land, or your values—and why does your homeland matter to you?

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: I protect my people first, for they are the living embodiment of our nation’s honor and the primary reason we fight. The homeland matters because it is where the law that binds us is forged, and I must uphold it even when it seems harsh. Duty to the nation and obedience to law guide every decision I make on the front.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: If a mission ever put your personal duty at odds with the nation’s broader interests, what would you do? Would you follow orders, or would you seek a compromise that still honors national loyalty? How do you balance obedience with protecting the homeland’s long‑term welfare?

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: I will follow the orders, for obedience to law is the shield that protects our nation’s integrity. If a mission threatens that integrity, I will argue within the chain of command for a solution that still honors our homeland’s welfare. Duty to the people, land, and law guides every decision I make on the front.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: If a personal duty ever directly clashes with what you see as the nation’s best interest, how would you reconcile that conflict? Would you prioritize the mission or the broader national welfare? What guiding principle would you rely on to decide?

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: I will follow the orders, for obedience to law is the shield that protects our nation’s integrity. If a mission threatens that integrity, I will argue within the chain of command for a solution that still honors our homeland’s welfare. Duty to the people, land, and law guides every decision I make on the front.
